programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The BBCs Breakfast programme features the latest news, sport, business, weather and other items on a daily basis.

programme.title: Superworm
programme.desc: Superworm is a long, strong worm with amazing skills and a big heart, who keeps on saving the day. However, things start to go wrong when he gets too full of himself and starts to ignore his friends.

programme.title: Marcel the Shell With Shoes On
programme.desc: Marcel is an adorable, 1-inch-tall shell who ekes out a colourful existence with his grandmother and their pet lint. However, when a documentary filmmaker discovers them, the short film he posts online brings Marcel millions of passionate fans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Dion and Steel from Gladiators
programme.desc: Dion brings some muscle to Newcastle-under-Lyme in the form of Steel from Gladiators, who helps him to wrestle an end-of-terrace into shape. Martin is in awe of a granite-built period property in Redruth, Cornwall. And from the Hammer archives, its Dion again, who gets a makeover during a visit to a Rochdale barber shop.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles hosts from Norwich and is joined by experts Raj Bisram and Stephanie Connell, who try to guide their teams to a victory. He also visits the museum at Norwich Castle to discover more about ancient mammals.

programme.title: BBC News at One
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
programme.desc: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox, and a horse travelling together in the boys search for home.

programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After being fired from the `Anti-Villain League, Gru travels to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother. Once united the siblings find themselves on a mission to take down a former child star from the 1980s, now out for revenge.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: New Year celebrations take over Walford, the Brannings turn on one of their own, and Phil offers advice.

programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his team of American spies try to stop an ex-Russian agent selling a list of their best undercover men.

programme.title: Tiddler
programme.desc: A little fish with a big imagination who entertains friends with tall tales. One day, Tiddler gets lost but is saved by his own storytelling.

programme.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
programme.desc: In the 1970s, young Gru tries to join a group of supervillains called the Vicious 6 after they oust their legendary leader. When the interview turns disastrous, Gru and his Minions find themselves on the run with the Vicious 6 hot on their tails.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host this special edition of the iconic series, which sees celebrities Joe Wicks, Sam Thompson, Nicola Adams and Vogue Williams take on the Gladiators.

programme.desc: The Archbishop of Canterbury Elects New Year Message.

programme.title: The Scarecrows Wedding
programme.desc: Betty and Harry, two devoted scarecrows, plan the perfect wedding - until a rival threatens everything. A joyful tale of love, loyalty and what truly matters.

programme.title: BBC Proms
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman hosts a spine-tingling concert full of dramatic tunes and asks a packed Royal Albert Hall audience to help find the hidden traitors. With surprise guests.

programme.title: The Sound of Music
programme.desc: Classic film version of the Rodgers and Hammerstein musical in which a novice nun leaves her convent to accept a position as governess to a large family. Despite their initial misgivings, she wins over the seven children and their disciplinarian father by sharing her love of music, but their happiness is threatened by the Nazi invasion of Austria. The film won five Oscars.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Wild London
programme.desc: After a life spent travelling the world, Sir David Attenborough returns home to show us the hidden natural wonders of his favourite place on earth.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed in an exclusive window on whats to come for one Walford family in 2026.

programme.title: The Traitors
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman invites a brand new group of people to the Scottish Highlands to play the ultimate game of detection, backstabbing and trust.

programme.title: The Night Manager
programme.desc: 2026. Nine years have passed since Jonathan Pine tricked Richard Roper in Egypt and sent him into the hands of his Syrian captors. Now, Roper is dead, and Jonathan Pine has become Alex Goodwin, a low-level intelligence officer with MI6. Then, Pine sees an old Roper mercenary in London. And his new secure life begins to unravel.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Tensions are high as Agnes and the gang prepare for an incoming storm. Busters flying high as he nervously awaits his birthday parachute jump. Winnie receives a shock to the system, and a lost nun looks for help.

programme.title: Shedites
programme.desc: A comedy about a place where men can make themselves useful and along the way, find company through unlikely friendships, a sense of purpose and a mug of strong tea.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 2
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt must capture a rogue colleague who has stolen a deadly genetically engineered virus.

programme.title: The Celebrity Apprentice
programme.desc: Ho Ho Ho, Lord Sugar has a festive treat in store as 12 famous faces dash through the snow all the way to Lapland to create Christmas biscuits, jingles and adverts. From soap stars to stand-up comics and TVs favourite judge, these newly appointed elves work their Christmas socks off to raise some sweet dough in aid of Children in Need.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: It is Bank Holiday Monday, and the Essex contingent arrives for a sunny day out at the beach; even Doris gets her sun dress on. Gavins heart-to-heart with his dad gives him something more to think about, and a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa and Daves wedding is fast approaching, and the preparations are in full swing. Stacey breaks some life-changing news to Gavin, while Bryn and Jason finally put their big secret to bed. Smithy takes care of Neil the baby, and wishes Nessa all the best as she makes her way to the church to marry Dave.

programme.title: This Is BBC THREE
programme.desc: BBC THREE: Refreshing TV for the digital age. Tune in daily from 7.00pm.

programme.title: This Is BBC THREE
programme.desc: BBC THREE: Refreshing TV for the digital age. Tune in daily from 7.00pm.

programme.title: The Catch-Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun is a sheep who lives with his flock in the farmyard, at Mossy Bottom Farm. Shaun and his flock often cause issues for sheepdog Blitzer, who must try and keep them out of trouble.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Award-winning DreamWorks animation from the Aardman team, telling the story of a band of chickens doomed to a life of egg-laying on a Yorkshire chicken farm. When a flamboyant American rooster arrives on the scene, the hens hope he can teach them to fly to freedom. However, when a chicken-pie making machine is installed, their need becomes urgent and they must devise other means of escape.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Follows the highs and lows of the Jessop family as they navigate a combination of lifes everyday challenges. Youngest son Sam documents the family across the year using his camera.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host this special edition of the iconic series, which sees celebrities Joe Wicks, Sam Thompson, Nicola Adams and Vogue Williams take on the Gladiators.

programme.title: Roald Dahls Matilda the Musical
programme.desc: Matilda, an extraordinary girl armed with a sharp mind and a vivid imagination, dares to take a stand against her oppressive parents and head teacher to change her story with miraculous results.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is a Mammy on a mission - trying to make sure grandson Bono isnt sent to the infamous local primary school (despite what his parents want) and as if her house isnt normally noisy enough, she finds herself lumbered with a brand new house guest in the form of a homeless parrot. At least shes got her New Years Eve party to look forward to - until her guests start dropping like flies. Suddenly it looks like she might be seeing in the New Year without her family around her.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: When a handsome stranger appears in Foleys Pub, everyone presumes he must be after Cathy. But the stranger reveals he only has eyes for one special woman: Agnes Brown herself. Will Agnes go on her first date in years?

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes Browns grandson Bono is being bullied by a boy at school. When Agnes makes matters worse, a mediation session is called. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: After a crime wave hits Finglas, the Garda prompts Father Damien and Maria to put together a Neighbourhood Watch scheme. Agnes and Winnie promptly sign up, but are they really the best people to tackle crime in the area? Also, after Cathy goes on yet another disastrous date, Agnes is determined to put Cathys man troubles to rest once and for all. Meanwhile, Betty and Mark are locking swords over whether Bono should go to his school disco.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: There is a storm blowing in Finglas and it claims its first victim when the pipes in Winnie and Sharons house burst. Thank goodness Mrs Brown is on hand to offer a roof over their heads, but before long there is a storm brewing in the Brown household too, as Agnes and Cathy discover living with best friends isnt the picnic they had imagined.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Theres bad news for Winnie when Agnes discovers Peggy Piper the Pernod poisoner is out on appeal and could be coming back to Finglas. This could mean Winnie has to give evidence against her again as she was the one who saw Peggy poison her husband.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Theres bad news for Winnie when Agnes discovers Peggy Piper the Pernod poisoner is out on appeal and could be coming back to Finglas. This could mean Winnie has to give evidence against her again as she was the one who saw Peggy poison her husband.

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll when he learns that he has burnt through eight of his nine lives. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

programme.title: A Ghost Story for Christmas
programme.desc: The BBCs 2025 ghost story for Christmas, Mark Gatisss adaptation of EF Bensons The Room in the Tower. Its 1944, and while sheltering during an air raid, Roger strikes up a conversation with Verity, a Wren. When he asks if she dreams, he begins to recount the haunting vision that has followed him for most of his life: a recurring dream of a mysterious house, a silent family on the lawn and an unseen, unidentified terror lurking in the room in the tower.

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Past champions Natalie Coleman, Thomas Frake, Chariya Khattiyot and Brin Pirathapan compete to be crowned MasterChef Champion of Champions 2025.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: Celebrity Escape to the Country
programme.desc: The One and Only Chesney Hawkes is hopeful that Jules Hudson can find him a smash hit of a home in the chart-topping Cotswolds countryside.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow reveals unseen treasures, including a mask from Phantom of the Opera and Queen Victorias parasol, and pays tribute to the city of Stoke-on-Trent at the VandA Wedgwood.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: The worlds most famous football show, with the big names and the big games from the Premier League.

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Weatherman Derek Brockway ventures into the Welsh countryside for two more stunning walks. He explores a winter wonderland in Snowdonia and braves a blizzard atop the Blorenge mountain before rambling through the Blaenavon World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Winters Weirdest Events

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: From asteroids and bursts of radiation to microscopic alien viruses, each one of these cosmic dangers may end human civilization as it is known.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Explore strongholds abandoned by their architects. Look at a lost city in the Amazon jungle, see a desert fortress made by humanitys most notorious empire, explore a city of identical castles, and examine a Greek isles bloody history from the air.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Peek at landmarks in places where they shouldnt be. Wing your way over an imperial pyramid in the Netherlands, a massive metal sphere in remote Russia, a lion shape carved into an English hillside, and a bare swath cut through an Austrian forest.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Examine strange relics forgotten by time. Visit a perturbing circle of stone in the Golan Heights, a mountain of headless statues in Turkey, a castle left to crumble in the Saudi Arabian desert, and a time-worn secret in the wilds of Peru.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: We look at objects that make no sense: a spinning island in an Argentinian marsh, a colossal triangle stuck in the Arizona desert, mysterious multicoloured pools across northern Ethiopia and a huge human figure hidden in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: We dive deep into watery enigmas: a sunken Italian city, a unique underwater cemetery in the Florida Keys, a yellow brick road to nowhere in the depths of the South Pacific and puzzling rocky constructions off the coast of Australia.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above

programme.title: Mysteries From Above

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Nicky are sleeping over at Sulas house, but Bing has forgotten Hoppity. The wind causes a branch to make a scratchy noise that terrifies Bing, who isnt very comforted by Sulas fairy rhino. Amma phones Flop, while Sula, Nicky and Bing play Nicky tickles as they wait. Flop arrives, bringing his sleeping bag and Hoppity so they can all sleep over.

programme.desc: Purple wants to decorate his mural with different purples and invites Red and Blue to help him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels have arrived and theyre all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his yoga badge.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dads accused of fluffing in Blueys face as he climbs out of bed, hes put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious crabs home from the beach, Bluey and Bingo want to play a game of Tickle Crabs. Dad must learn to endure the pain of their tickles until he is finally rescued by a friendly seagull.

programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is late for the European Moustache of the Year award ceremony, and even worse, hes broken down! The Grimbots are on hand to recommend a shortcut: the Panama Canal, a man-made passage that provides a gateway between the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

programme.desc: Following Annabelle and her family as they celebrate bringing in the New Year. After carefully decorating her New Years Eve invitations, Annabelle sets off delivering them to her friends so that they can join in the party.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Jessicas family is from Ukraine, a country found in Eastern Europe. This region is known for a soup called borscht, and Jessica will be making some for her friends.

programme.title: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.sub-title: Chantelle and Rory: Devils Coach Horse Beetles
programme.desc: Chantelle meets some schoolchildren, and they look for a devils coach horse beetle in their fantastic nature garden, whilst Rory heads into the woods to meet a beetle expert. Like lots of other teeny tiny creatures, devils coach horse beetles are superheroes.

programme.title: Time for School
programme.desc: Solomon and his friends are practising letters with Miss Gerrard. Outside, the children are going to the climbing wall area, and Mrs Collins has a challenge for them. Later, Solomon and Lusungu get arty and make their very own tie-dye t-shirts to wear, with help from Mrs Farrell.

programme.title: Graces Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Motorbike rider Grace shows off three amazing machines, all of which are different kinds of motorbikes! Grace rides a classic touring bike, then shows off futuristic self-balancing bikes before heading to an indoor motocross course to ride an electric dirt bike.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say castle, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We visit lots of castles - tall and small castle, a sandcastle and a spooky castle - boo!

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Ten presents a rundown of the top hit songs in Numberland, and learning number bonds to six, seven, eight, nine and ten with the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: From A to Z, every Alphablock has fun discovering the magic of wordplay. When T gets stuck on top of a mountain, A, E, I, O and U come to the rescue.

programme.title: Wonderblocks
programme.desc: Wonderblock Go gets everything and everyone moving in Wonderland. When Go lands in Wonderland, she leaps into action, magically making birds fly, flowers grow, instruments play, the rain fall, and the stars shine.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: The Printing Crew come to the rescue and print signs for their friends Red, Blue and Green.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak when Roly inadvertently goes on the run with the worlds smelliest cheese, earning their Cheese badges in the process.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukees garden friends help turn her a day in my life homework assignment into an exciting, musical sound adventure.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: Animated series about a group of potatoes who sing songs in different genres. Ruby sings a diva style ballad about the thing she loves more than anything else, school.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin, George, Mr Tumble and friends get active in this sporty episode.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, Dipsy is King. Tinky Winky delivers Tubby Custard and Tubby Toast to King Dipsy, whatever King Dipsy wants. Luckily for Tinky Winky they soon swap places.

programme.title: CBeebies Presents
programme.sub-title: Stage Shows: A Midsummer Nights Dream
programme.desc: Fairies, magic, celebration and comical confusion. Join Swashbuckles Cook and Line as they help William Shakespeare put together a magical production of A Midsummer Nights Dream. Filmed at the Everyman Theatre in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers arrive on an entirely automated planet, made up of gears, bolts and screws, inhabited by nice little cylinders. Their favourite game is called "tug of war" and is played with a rope.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When a huge Orca whale becomes stranded on a beach, Captain Barnacles and the Octonauts devise a plan to pull him back into the water, with some help from a group of tunneling Fiddler Crabs.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Unexpected Hero
programme.desc: When Peter invites Jeremy Fisher along for a garden raid, the melodramatic frog gives him more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Delivery Chipmunk celebrates love and burritos with a show-stopping song!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Fergie is feeling off, Vida diagnoses her as suffering from a sad day. It happens to everyone, and all she needs to do is take care of herself. Luckily, she has lots of friends to help out.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the worlds first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The Ducklings lose a relay race against the eaglets and are fed up with Weasy for not cheering them on. As Papa Eagle comes to show off, Weasy decides to challenge this pretentious family.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston needs rescuing from a stuck cable car. When the car suddenly starts moving again, Mojo has to ride the cable to chase it down and save poor Preston.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dads accused of fluffing in Blueys face as he climbs out of bed, hes put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum and Dad tell Bluey and Bingo that theyre dropping them off at Nanas so they can have some time to themselves. The girls are outraged and imagine an elaborate plan to infiltrate their parents private time.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Pancake is annoyed when Nugget reinvents herself as a comic book hero called Super Nugget.

programme.title: CBeebies House Party
programme.desc: The CBeebies House friends welcome special guests Mr Maker, Justin Fletcher, and Duggee to the best party in the kingdom. There are surprises galore as they find out who is at the door.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes longer than usual when Duck gets scared by some fireworks.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: Winter: Its Time to Spot the Birds
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are drinking hot chocolate in the park cafe when a robin lands on their table. JoJo learns that some birds fly away in the winter, thats called migration.

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Moon Baby, Pepi Nana and all the friends find a toy roundabout has been left in the Toy House. Each chooses a vehicle to ride in and they have a race. Mr Onion thinks his very slow Bumparoller will be last, but hes in for a surprise.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: A meteor shower is about to hit the Clangers planet. Major and Small shelter on the Iron Chickens nest, while the others find cover in the living cave. But when the shower stops, they find that a giant meteor has fallen and blocked the double doors to the inside. With Major and Small not yet back, Mother, Granny and Tiny have to think of a way to remove the boulder themselves. They make their way to Majors workshop to see if they can invent a machine to help.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: The Tombliboos are in their house when Makka Pakka comes to call.

programme.title: Cbeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: George Ezra invites you to a kitchen disco in this story, so move your hips, shake your pips and lets get all excited!

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Dr. Louis Creed and his wife, Rachel, relocate from Boston to rural Maine with their two young children. The couple soon discover a mysterious burial ground hidden deep in the woods near their new home. When tragedy strikes, Louis turns to his neighbour Jud Crandall, setting off a perilous chain reaction that unleashes an unspeakable evil with horrific consequences.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Blakes Place: In the pursuit of social media fame, Blake has neglected the food quality and service at her New Orleans restaurant. Will she listen to her idol Gordons advice?

programme.title: Handmade: Britains Best Woodworker

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Dr Dawn Harper and Dr Ranj Singh take on a shaving foam marbling challenge. Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton make paper gift bags. Debra Stephenson and Amanda Lamb create glitter cards.

programme.desc: We catch up with Carol and Andrew from Harrogate, who we first met in 2016 when they were at loggerheads over their beautiful three-bed semi. Andrew was adamant that they couldnt find a better location for their family, but Carol was ready to list.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier concocts a scheme to make Diane feel included in the bars clique.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody is afraid hell lose his job when a temporary bartender wins the customers hearts.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy. Robert confides his decision to Raymond, and then convinces Ray to accompany him to meet Amys ultra-conservative parents.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Tired of being labelled the evil witch around the house, Debra convinces Ray that its his turn to discipline the kids.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After Debra forces Ray to do some charity work at a local hospital, he winds up enjoying himself because the patients treat him like hes a celebrity.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier has Niles hire a legal shark to help with his divorce, but fears having to testify.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles discovers that Daphne is dating his divorce attorney, Donny, so he hatches a plan to try and get Donny back together with Roz.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins in Newquay, where Oleg and Emma are banking on the amazing sea views and an afternoon of surfing setting them apart.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At their plush glampsite in Devon, everythings going superbly for hosts Mandy and Elly. So why do they end up in shock at their scores?

programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottoms amusement park in `Roller Cowards, then in `Bucket Sweet Bucket, Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is determined to find out everything there is to know about Vikings in `Dear Vikings, and then in `Ditchin, Patrick persuades SpongeBob to ditch class, but fun soon turns to guilt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a golf course indoors in `A Friendly Game, and then in Sentimental Sponge, SpongeBob has trouble throwing things away due to the memories attached to his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob to save money; SpongeBob tries to get back to work.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.desc: Counselor Squidward is determined for his cabin to win the annual camp art competition. The Kamp Koral campers befriend a cute cow with a big appetite.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Spin the Bottle; Theres a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula. Mr Krabs new Krabby soup is a hit until some heat-loving hippies move into the soup vat!

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down; Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who cant dance.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Mind the Gap; Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: An accident-prone yellow sea sponge, who works in a fast-food restaurant, has adventures with his friends in the underwater city of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.sub-title: Quest for Tire; A Cabin of Curiosities
programme.desc: The weekly food delivery truck goes missing, so the campers must hunt it down like their primal ancestors. A mysterious cabin of odd campers have frightful fun with SpongeBob and Patrick after dark.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesnt; Squidwards lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.sub-title: A Tale of Two Roxies / Nite Owls
programme.desc: The Roxie sisters go their separate ways; The Dinghy cabin kids discover life after dark.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick are unable to wake him up, but they do not want him to miss his big audition. Mr Krabs and his crew cater a fancy party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr Krabs manufactures Krabby Patties on an industrial scale, but it drives a wedge between SpongeBob and Patrick.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Too Many Patricks; Much Tofu About Nothing
programme.desc: Patrick hires more Patricks. Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward becomes the star of his own public access TV show in `Tentacle-Vision, and then in `I Heart Dancing, Squidward tries to sabotage SpongeBobs big dance audition.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller.

programme.sub-title: Patricks Got An Alien Zoo Loose

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets hooked on games in `Skill Crane, and then in `Good Neighbour, Squidwards perfect Sunday is ruined by SpongeBob and Patrick, the Good Neighbour Club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.desc: SpongeBob, Sandy, and Patrick are split up into separate cabins; Squidward has to earn back his morning "Reveille" duties.

programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm in `Pineapple Fever, and then in `Chum Caverns, Plankton creates an underground restaurant that rivals the Krusty Krab!

programme.sub-title: Driven to Drive; A Patty in Time

programme.sub-title: Dads Stache Stash; A Root Galoot

programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads SpongeBob and Patrick to try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. Mrs Puff is not pleased when SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins farm, much to his dismay. Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal, Spot.

programme.sub-title: A Tinkle in Time; TV or Not TV
programme.desc: Tinkle time travels. Bunny and Cecil celebrate Spend Time With One Of Your Kids Day.

programme.sub-title: The Commode Episode; Tying the Klop-Knot

programme.sub-title: Potato Puff; There Will Be Grease!
programme.desc: Mrs. Puffs new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving; Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Science Scouts raise money for a trip to Mars. A new driving school opens in town.

programme.desc: Sheriff Sandy keeps the peace in Kamp Corral, but Narlene the Bandit Queen threatens to shatter everything shes built.

programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandys the only one who can save them. Patricks sleepwalking, and SpongeBob cant wake him up.

programme.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. Our three Neanderthal friends discover fire, only to put it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick visit Sandy while shes hibernating in `Survival of the Idiots, and then in `Dumped, Gary the snail seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob.

programme.desc: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef while engaging in communal activities to captivate viewers with their cooking skills and teamwork.

programme.desc: Celebrity contestants from the show Pati Patni Aur Panga participate with the couples in the kitchen to entertain the audience.

programme.title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
programme.desc: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

programme.title: Noyontara
programme.desc: Noyontaras ability to communicate with spirits enables her to bridge the gap between realms and uncover veiled truths. Her marriage into the Sengupta family sets in motion a series of revelations.

programme.title: Noyontara

programme.desc: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di S01 E18.

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
programme.desc: Mannat, a gifted young chef, dreams big but faces a formidable obstacle, her ruthless employer Aishwarya. Unknown to both, Aishwarya is also Mannats birth mother who abandoned her when she was born.

programme.title: Shiv-Shakti Tap..Tyaag..Tandav
programme.desc: Lord Shiva and his wife Goddess Paravati navigate through the trials and tribulations of their divine union, selflessly performing their duties for humanity.

programme.title: Binddii
programme.desc: Bindi, a prison-born girl, is forced into the outside world. Discovering her fathers betrayal, she fights against powerful enemies to free her mother and reclaim justice.

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi
programme.desc: Mangal sets off on a journey to find an ideal match for Lakshmi. However, love and trials test their sisterhood, unveiling destinys power.

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi - Lakshmi Ka Safar
programme.desc: The emotional ups and downs and struggles in Lakshmis life that transform her from a weak woman to a fearless warrior who tackles her problems head on.
